title: Clean Netherite Armor
description: Clean Netherite Armor is a minimalist rework of Minecraft’s netherite armor, designed for players who prefer a sleek, modern, and uncluttered look.
body:
Clean Netherite Armor is a minimalist rework of Minecraft’s netherite armor, designed for players who prefer a sleek, modern, and uncluttered look.
The armor keeps the iconic dark netherite feel while removing excessive highlights and noise, resulting in a smooth and balanced design that fits perfectly with clean UIs, PvP, and cinematic gameplay.

**Features**

Clean, minimalist netherite armor design

Dark, smooth textures with reduced visual noise

Preserves vanilla netherite style while enhancing clarity

Ideal for PvP, survival, and content creation

**Compatibility**

Minecraft Version: Java Edition (1.21+ recommended)

Works with: Sodium, OptiFine, Fabric, Forge
**
Notes**

Only affects netherite armor

No gameplay changes — purely visual

Lightweight and performance-friendly
